'''Malakin Enterprises''' was a [[Lesu]]-based corporation that dabbled in several criminal venues. Rumored to be secretly controlled by [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]], Malakin was part of the [[Tenloss Syndicate/Legends|Tenloss Syndicate]],<ref name="GG11" /> and was the largest stockholder in the [[Natori Association]].<ref name="J15">{{JournalCite|15|Special Military Unit Intelligence Update}}</ref>

{{Company-stub}}
